## Checklist

- [ ] All tests pass (`pytest` green)
- [ ] No mock/stub data in production code paths
- [ ] All PII is masked in logs, API responses, and audit trails
- [ ] HITL gates are preserved (no bypass of human approval steps)
- [ ] Confidence thresholds are unchanged or explicitly approved
- [ ] Circuit breaker and retry logic remain intact
- [ ] Observability: new metrics/logs follow existing naming conventions
- [ ] Database migrations are backward-compatible (if applicable)
- [ ] Documentation updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
